description: An inert or validated patch candidate derived from a source scan finding.

runId.description: The scan run that produced this candidate.

affectedFiles.description: List of file paths affected by this patch.

workspaceWritesEnabled.description: Whether the workspace allows patch application.

requiresHumanReview.description: Whether a human must approve before application.

patch.description: Unified diff patch text (null for inert candidates).
